title: Backend Developer Vacancy at DXC Technology India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at DXC Technology India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DXC Technology India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About DXC Technology India:
DXC Technology India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DXC Technology India!
